details.IncidentDetail: "[88] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt to 1181-Trfc Collision-Minor Inj by CHP"
"[55] LL WITH MERCY -- THEY NOW HAVE A 39 MIN ETA TO DRMC THEIR BASE WAS IN BLYTHE "
"[54] [Notification] [CHP]-MERCY LIFTING FROM DESERT IN 5 - ETA TO BLYTYHE 45 MIN RUN# 26-115807"
"[50] PER AMR UNK EXTENT OF INJ AT THIS TIEM "
"[48] MERCY IS CURRENTLY AT BASE THEY WILL CALL WHEN THEY ARE ENRT WITH ETA "
"[37] ATTEMPTING TO GET WARRANT HIT CONFIRMED-- BO FAX/PRINTER DELAYED RESPONSE"
"[36] 6-30 PRTY WILL BE TRANS TO DRMC "
"[26] 6-S4 START 1185 FOR A A VEH APPROX 80 FT OFF THE RDWY "
"[20] PER BLYFD --- ETA IS 1 OUT -- BEHIND AMR"
"[16] 6-S4 PRTY IS TRAPPED DUE TO THE DMG TO THE VEH ,BUT IS AWAKE AND SPEAKING "
"[12] 1039 BLYTHE PD - FIRE AND PARAMEDICE AS WELL AS BLYTHE PD ENRT"
"[11] PER BSCC-- 6-30 IS ON THE WHITE-- 1039 BSCC TO ADV 6-30 TO SWITCH TO THE RED "
"[6] RP 1023 IN A ALUMINIUM CYBER TRUCK BY THE T/C"
